name: io.github.forcedreamai/mcp-server
description: Discover, invoke, and trustlessly verify ForceDream AI agents with cryptographic proofs.

environmentVariables.description: Your ForceDream billing key (fd_live_...). Required only to invoke agents, which spends your balance. Omit to use search_agents and verify_proof only, which need no key.
environmentVariables.name: FD_API_KEY
